raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ko eſſi tu apſinehjis un
ſatinojis? nn prett ko eſſi tu ta-
wu Baſſi pazehlis? un tawas
Azzis augſti uszehlis? prett to
Swehtu eekſch Iſraëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zaur taweein Wehſtne-
scheim eſſi tu to KUNgu apmeb-
dijs/ un faſzijs: Eṣzaur manno
Ratto Pułku eſmu us to Kalnu
Angſtumeem kaḣpis/ us Lihba-
nus Sahneem/ un es iſzirtifchu
winna angſtus Zeedra-Kohkus/
un iſlaſſitas Preedes/ un nahk-
fchn lihds tai Mahjas-Weetai /
kas paſcha Gallā irr winna Kar-
meta Mescha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu razzis un tweſchus
Uhdenis dſehris/un es ar fawahm
Pehdahm eſmu wiſfo ſtipro
Weetu lippeś taufas padarrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne eſſi tu dsirdejs/ ka es
to jaw fenn papreekſchu eſmu
darrijs/ jo wezzôs Laikds etmu
es to taifijs/ nu eſmu es to liẓ-
zis nahkt/ ka tew bij buht/ kam
bij ſtiprus Pilsfahtus iſpohſtiht/
un par pohſtahm Akminu Koh-
pahm darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz btja to Gedſihtwo-
taju Rohkas nogurrufchas / un
tee iſtrubzinajahs/un tappe Kan-
nā/tee btja ka ta Tibruna Sah-
le/ un ka to Jumtu Seens /kas
fakalſt/ pirnis tas eenahkahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet es ſinnu tawu Dſih-
wokli/ un tawu Iſeetchanu un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tawas Trakkeſcha-
nas deht prett mann/ un tawas
Wehlibas pehz / ka ta preekſch
mannahm Auſim nahkuſi/ lik-
schn es fawu Makschkerti tawās
Nahfis / un Lauschkus tawā
Muttē/ un likſchn tew atpakkat
greestees pa to Zelfu / pa kurru
tu eſſi nahzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fchi buhſtew par twee-
nu Sihini / fchai Gaddā ehD / E
kas famihts irr / un ohtrā Gad-
dā/ kas no ſew paſcha ang/ un
trefchā Gaddā fehjeet un ptanjeet/
un stahdajt Wihna- Dahrsus /
un ehdeet winnu Augſtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas Nains Juhda/
kas tsglahbts un atlizzis irr/ ſak-
kinahs atkaž femmjupp/ un neſ-
ſihs Augſtus augſchop.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo no Jeruſalemes iſces
tee/ kas atlilkſchi irr/ un tee at-
peſtiti no Zianas Kalna. To dar-
rihs ta karsta Duſinoschana ta
KUNGA Zelvaät.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ta ſakka tas
KUNGS no ta Rehnina no Af-
firijas : Wiꞥſch fchai Pilsfahta
ne nahks/ ir eekſch tahs ne weenu
Bultu fchaus / un ne kahdas
preekſchturranas Brunnas tue
preekſcha nahks / un ne kahdu
Walli prett to uſmettihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pa to paſchu Zelfu/ kur
wiꞥſch nahzis / buhs winnam
atpakkat greestees / bet fchai
Pilsfahta wiꞥſch ne nahks/ ſak-
ka tas KUNGS.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
